name: IBM MTRAG
capability_target: Multi-turn RAG memory with later-turn, non-standalone, unanswerable, and multi-domain questions.

input_contract.metadata: official source card and domain/task taxonomy
input_contract.context: private multi-turn conversation and corpus snippets
input_contract.evidence: retrieved support and prior-turn bridge rows
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.answer_accuracy: exact local answer or abstention for private fixtures
output_contract.residuals: turn bridge miss, wrong domain, false answer, or underspecification miss

smoke_steps: verify repository license and data terms
admit deterministic answerable/unanswerable scoring lanes only
run private multi-turn RAG analogues first
contamination_policy: MTRAG public conversations/corpora are calibration-only. Do not train on public turns, retrieved passages, answers, or task templates.
regression_policy: If mastered, keep private multi-turn RAG rows as regression.

permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving or LLM-as-judge substitution.
